text.nodata: This workflow has no runs yet
text.nodata_description: It looks like you don't have any runs. Get started by running this workflow.
text.deletion_warning: The workflow run contains the execution results of each node. Deleting it may trigger re-application or re-deployment of certificates due to the inability to find the previous execution result. Please do not delete unless necessary. Recommend keeping it for at least 180 days.
text.cancellation_warning: If the process is unexpectedly terminated or the server times out, you can manually cancel long-hanging runs to prevent blocking subsequent executions.

cancel.modal.title: Cancel workflow run
cancel.modal.content: Are you sure to cancel this run?

delete.modal.title: Delete "{{name}}"
delete.modal.content:
Are you sure want to delete this workflow run?
This action cannot be undone.

batch_delete.modal.title: Delete workflow runs
batch_delete.modal.content:
Are you sure want to delete these {{count}} selected workflow runs?
This action cannot be undone.
